# Phase 1: Teaching TUI MVP

## Status

Archived.

Phase 1 built the local FuFan Teaching Agent MVP on top of the CodeWhale fork.
The work focused on making agent runtime activity visible for classroom use:
tool calls, shell commands, file changes, skills, context, safety events, and
session exports.

## Features

| Feature | Status | Purpose |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `001-teaching-agent-tui` | Archived | Local teaching TUI, sidebar observer, course loading, JSONL and Markdown exports. |

## Archive Policy

Phase 1 feature documents are retained as historical delivery records. New work
that changes the product after the MVP should be planned under a later phase
unless it is a bug fix for the original MVP scope.
